# withSahib
> SEBI Registered Research Analyst platform founded by Sahib Singh Hora (INH000026266)

## About
withSahib provides structured equity research for Indian stock markets including swing trade setups, intraday picks, and options signals for Nifty, BankNifty, Sensex, FinNifty, and MidcapNifty.

## Founder
Sahib Singh Hora — SEBI Registered Research Analyst, INH000026266

## Services
- Swing Trade Research: Daily scans of 1500+ NSE stocks using 15 bullish and 13 bearish technical patterns
- Intraday Research: Nifty 500 stocks, 1H evening watchlist + 15M real-time alerts
- Index Options: Nifty (65 units, Tuesday expiry), BankNifty (30 units, Tuesday), FinNifty (60 units, Tuesday), MidcapNifty (120 units, Tuesday), Sensex (20 units, Thursday)
- Stock Options: F&O eligible NSE stocks (~200 stocks)

## Compliance
SEBI Research Analyst Registration: INH000026266
Regulated by: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)
Compliant with: SEBI (Research Analysts) Regulations, 2014

## Website
https://www.withsahib.com
